name: Mall Checkout Trainee
description: Freshly hired from the Pretzel Hut next door. Scans items at a pace best described as 'contemplative.'

name: Register Wrangler
description: Survived two holiday rushes at MegaMart. Can work a register without looking at the keys.

name: Speed-Scan Savant
description: Legend has it they once rang up forty-seven items in under a minute at the old ValueVerse. Fingers like lightning.

name: Shelf Stacker Newbie
description: Knows which end of the box cutter to hold. Still figuring out the inventory system.

name: Backroom Specialist
description: Former overnight crew at BulkZone. Can unpack a pallet blindfolded and shelve by category in their sleep.

name: Inventory Overlord
description: Ran the stockroom at three different SuperSaver locations simultaneously. Shelves fear this person.

name: Awkward Welcomer
description: Waves at customers from across the store. Sometimes customers wave back. Conversion rate: hopeful.

name: Friendly Floor Guide
description: Worked the welcome desk at FunZone Family Center. Knows how to turn a browser into a buyer with a smile.

name: Charisma Engine
description: Could sell ice to penguins. Former face of the GloboMall grand opening. Customers feel personally invited.
